normalization: Claim-bearing Chinese tutorial sections were extracted from SSR MDContent and represented as English factual paraphrases with stable section hints.
rights_note: Only short normalized claim evidence and locators are retained; the full Volcengine tutorial is not redistributed.

items.normalized_evidence: The Volcengine tutorial says prompt references use the media type plus a one-based ordinal corresponding to that media type's order in the request content array; an Asset ID is not the prompt-visible reference.
A current Volcengine multimodal example uses explicit second ranges for successive events; this proves an official surface example, not a universal timing rule.

The tutorial documents assigning supplied images the structured first-frame and last-frame roles instead of relying only on prompt references. This establishes role designation, not guaranteed pixel-level preservation of generated endpoints.

notes: Research on 2026-07-11 recorded the same raw MDContent hash as the prior observation. The raw provider bytes are not redistributed; reviewers must re-fetch the pinned URL and match the recorded hash and locator.
